description: Verso (original use): Deed of lease. In Arabic script. Fragment (upper right corner). The basmala and the beginnings of five lines are preserved. The lessee is Ibrāhīm b. Khalaf al-[...]. Reference is made to the bureau of the mosques (Dīwān al-Jawāmiʿ wa-l-Masājid) and to New Cairo (al-Qāhira al-Maḥrūsa). Dating: Mentions Dhū l-Qaʿda 525 AH = September/October 1131 CE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
